spec_natural_language: function __TokenRoles_init MUST revert when the contract has already been initialized

violated_invariant.precondition: contract has already been initialized (initializer called once before)
violated_invariant.expected_behavior: subsequent calls to __TokenRoles_init should revert to prevent re-initialization

extraction_reasoning: The finding clearly describes that __TokenRoles_init lacks the initializer modifier, allowing anyone to call it multiple times. The invariant is explicit: initialization functions should only execute once. The affected lines are explicitly referenced in the report.
